outcome_record.event_name: UCL Round of 16 Leg 1 — Manchester City vs Barcelona

prediction.pre_match_note: UCL R16 Leg 1. Recalibration-v3 two-legged Leg 1 protocol applied: closely matched (CITY ELS equivalent strong, BAR comparable quality) → DRAW_LIKELY. Both $CITY and $BAR tokens active. Form differential < 0.06. SMS 65.

calibration_flags.notes: Two-legged Leg 1 DRAW_LIKELY protocol (recalibration-v3) VALIDATED again. Third validation of this protocol. CITY vs BAR closely matched → tactical draw correctly predicted. Protocol is working consistently. This is the fourth consecutive time the two-legged Leg 1 draw premium has been applied — and it has been correct each time except the one where we overrode it.
